text.tspan: Share of children with diarrhea receiving oral rehydration salts and

The share of children under five years old with diarrhea, in the two weeks prior to the survey, who received
oral rehydration
Note: The prevalence of diarrhea may vary by season. Since surveys are administered at different times, data should be compared with
